creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
olgeni      2012-06-30 20:53:34 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    lang/erlang14        Makefile Makefile.lib Makefile.man 
                         distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
  Log:
  Forced commit to document repocopy of lang/erlang into lang/erlang14.
  
  Since not all Erlang software may be compatible with R15, lang/erlang14
  will be used to keep R14 around for ports that still need it.
  
  PR:             ports/169386
  Submitted by:   olgeni
  Repocopy by:    marcus
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.172     +0 -0      ports/lang/erlang14/Makefile
  1.42      +1 -1      ports/lang/erlang14/Makefile.lib
  1.28      +1 -1      ports/lang/erlang14/Makefile.man
  1.51      +0 -0      ports/lang/erlang14/distinfo
  1.4       +0 -0      ports/lang/erlang14/pkg-descr
  1.26      +0 -0      ports/lang/erlang14/pkg-plist
